prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约14845→15686→18673→16151→17147，近5年整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约17147名；2023年曾大幅后移至18673名，2024年有所 回升，2025年再度小幅后移，显示竞争强度波动中略增；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021年34人、2022年37人、2023年32人、2024年30人、2025年30人；2026年 计划29人，较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招约3.3%，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第70名，近 年排名稳定在64–70区间，属中上游211，综合实力受认可；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被举报抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查 ，对报考心理有一定负面影响；抖音热度排名第81位，评价为一般，短视频曝光量偏低，未形成明显报考助推效应；地质学A、考古学A、软件工程A-，3个A-及 以上学科；其中软件工程与计算机类招生专业关联密切，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业2024–2026年社会热 度持续偏高（高热推荐/推荐），与西北大学计算机类、物理学类等招生专业方向匹配，可能吸引更多考生报考；2026年重庆物理类考生约13.7万人，较2025年13.95万人略减约1. 8%，竞争压力小幅缓和；西北大学位于陕西西安，属西部211，在重庆招生计划占比较小（近年约30人左右），地域偏好 对重庆考生报考决策影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次17147名、2026年小幅缩招（30→29人，竞争略加剧）、声誉偏负面（贾浅浅事件可能轻微抑制报考热情）、 但计算机类等热门专业持续高热吸引考生、以及重庆物理类考生总数略降等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年略有前移（更易进）；预测最低位次约16754名，区间16254–1 7254名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14845 → 15686 → 18673 → 16151 → 17147, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend over the past five years, with a baseline of about 17147 in 2025; in 2023, it significantly shifted back to 18673, rebounded somewhat in 2024, and slightly shifted back again in 2025, indicating fluctuating but slightly increasing competition intensity; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category was 34 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 30 in 2024, and 30 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 29, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.3%, theoretically making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 70th, with recent rankings stable in the 64–70 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with recognized comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature, for which the university has established a special task force to investigate, having a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 81st, rated as average, with low short video exposure, not forming a significant boost to applications; it has 3 A- or above disciplines: Geology A, Archaeology A, Software Engineering A-; among them, Software Engineering is closely related to the computer-related enrollment majors, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have maintained high social popularity from 2024 to 2026 (highly recommended/recommended), matching the enrollment directions of Northwest University's Computer Science and Physics categories, potentially attracting more applicants; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing is about 137,000, a slight decrease of about 1.8% from 139,500 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 211 university, with a relatively small enrollment plan in Chongqing (about 30 people in recent years), and regional preference has a neutral impact on Chongqing applicants' decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17147, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (30→29, slightly intensified competition), negative reputation (the Jia Qianqian incident may mildly suppress application enthusiasm), but the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science attracting applicants, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 16754, with a range of 16254–17254.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Software Engineering)
- Computer Science and Technology (Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Xiong Qinglai Class)
- Mathematics Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics)
- Physics (Base Class)
- Physics Class (including Physics, Applied Physics, Materials Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Economics (Mathematical Economics Experimental Class)
- Economic Statistics (Data Technology Application Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geology Class (including Geological Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering)
- Geographical Science Class (including Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning, Geographic Information Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16254–17254, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 Computer Class as a reach, and Tier 3 Geology/Geography Class as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16254), you can focus on reaching for top majors like Computer Class and Artificial Intelligence Experimental Class.
